evals.prompt: run the post creator on the next draft row in my schedule
evals.expected_output: Reads the next actionable row from SM Schedule via schedule.py, runs Exa research to find 8-12 sources, loads those URLs into a NotebookLM notebook and asks it for a detailed Formal response and a Simplified one, generates the post per the row's mode/pillars/format from the Formal source, pauses at the checkpoint, then (on OK) saves one Google Doc with SIX REAL TABS named LinkedIn / LinkedIn - Infographics Prompt / Instagram / Instagram - Carousel Prompt / Source / Source_S (each independently clickable in the Doc's left sidebar, not just headings in one tab), and writes the doc URL into the row's Final Video/Post cell with Status=Draft.

evals.prompt: create the post for the GLM 5.2 row in my posting schedule
evals.expected_output: Finds the row by topic via schedule.py find, runs the same end-to-end flow. The row has no Reference URL, so research runs from topic + description alone and still produces a usable source pack. Design Template cell names both a LinkedIn and Instagram template; both prompt sets are emitted.

evals.prompt: process my schedule - the mastering claude code row
evals.expected_output: Finds the row; its Design Template cell is blank or names a template number with no folder on disk. The skill surfaces the template inventory (LinkedIn {1,2,4,9,10,11}, Instagram {1,2,6,10}) and asks which to use rather than guessing. The rest of the flow (research, post, doc, write-back) proceeds normally once answered.
